name: Zscaler
confidenceReason: Pioneer in zero-trust cloud security. 25-35% revenue growth with expanding margins. But elevated non-GAAP PE and execution risk in competitive market.
bullCase: Leading zero-trust security platform replacing legacy firewalls. 125%+ net retention rate. TAM expanding as enterprises shift to cloud-native security. Rule of 40 score of ~55%. AI-powered threat detection adds differentiation. Only pure-play zero-trust at scale.
bearCase: Still GAAP unprofitable. High SBC dilution. Competition from PANW and CRWD expanding into SASE. CEO transition risk. 40x forward non-GAAP PE is demanding. Customer concentration in large enterprises.

cagrModel.basis: Non-GAAP adjusted EPS (excl SBC); growth premium; bear assumes deceleration + compression

screener.note: Signal capped at WAIT due to customer concentration risk (DEPLOY override: base CAGR 76% ≥ 20%)

description: Zscaler, Inc. operates as a cloud security company worldwide.
